---
title: "indiator_setup"
output: html_document
---

# setup
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(mgcv)
library(gratia)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(marea)
```

# ESS regional LONG indicators
```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

ei_ess<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="ESS"]
#collect fishing/landings pressures
pressures_ess<-ei_ess@data |> 
    select(landings_all=landings_ALL_value, 
           landings_forage=landings_FORAGE.L_value,
           landings_largepelagic=landings_LARGE_PELAGIC.L_value,
           landings_flatfish=landings_FLATFISH.L_value,
           landing_skates=landings_SKATES.L_value,
           mtl_landings=MeanTL.Landings_value,
           mti_landings=MTI.Landings_3.25_value,
           diversity_tspp=DiversityTargetSpp_ALL_value,
           fp_all=FP_ALL_value,
           fp_clupeids=FP_CLUPEIDS_value
           )

#collect environmental pressures
data("amo")
data("azmp_bottom_temperature")
data("nao")
data("azmp_stratification")

amo_annual <- amo@data |> 
  group_by(year) |> 
  summarise(amo_mean = mean(SSTA_value, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(amo_mean)

nao_annual <- nao@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(nao=anomaly_value)

stratification_annual <-azmp_stratification@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(stratification=mean_value)

salinity_annual <-azmp_salinity@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(salinity=mean_value)

bottom_temp<-azmp_bottom_temperature@data |> 
  filter(region %in% "4W") |>
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  complete(year=1970:2022) |> 
  select(bottom_temp=mean_value)

#ice_volume derived from ice.max
dat<-gslea::EA.query.f(years=1900:2022, variables=c("ice.max"), EARs=1:7)

 ice_max_volume <- dat |> #sum ice.max across all EAR (gulf regions)
    group_by(year) |>
    summarise(
        total_ice_max = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
 ice_vol<-ice_max_volume |> 
   mutate(ice_vol=total_ice_max/3) |>  #back of the envelope calculation based on comparisons with benoit's data in azmpdata
   add_row(year = 1975, ice_vol = NA) |> #missing 1975
   filter(year>= 1970, year<=2022) |> 
   select(ice_vol)


#bind everything
pressures_ess<- cbind(pressures_ess, bottom_temp, nao_annual, amo_annual, stratification_annual, salinity_annual, ice_vol)

#remove weird 2021 fpall value >3, probably also weird
pressures_ess[52,"fp_all"]<-NA

indicators_ess<-ei_ess@data |> 
    select(heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           condition_finfish=CCondition_FINFISH_value,
           condition_zoopiscivore=CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value, 
           mls=MeanLifespan_value,
           biomass_all=BIOMASS_ALL_value,
           biomass_flatfish=BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
           biomass_gadoids=BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
           biomass_skates=BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
           biomass_forage=BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
           ivi_landings=IVILandings_value
           )
mtlc<-mtlc_esswss |> 
  filter(ID %in% "ESS") |> 
  select(MeanTLCommunity)
#join columns
indicators_ess<-cbind(indicators_ess, mtlc)

```

# WSS regional LONG indicators
```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

ei_wss<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="WSS"]
#collect fishing/landings pressures
pressures_wss<-ei_wss@data |> 
    select(landings_all=landings_ALL_value, 
           landings_forage=landings_FORAGE.L_value,
           landings_largepelagic=landings_LARGE_PELAGIC.L_value,
           landings_flatfish=landings_FLATFISH.L_value,
           landing_skates=landings_SKATES.L_value,
           mtl_landings=MeanTL.Landings_value,
           mti_landings=MTI.Landings_3.25_value,
           diversity_tspp=DiversityTargetSpp_ALL_value,
           fp_all=FP_ALL_value,
           fp_clupeids=FP_CLUPEIDS_value
           )

#collect environmental pressures
data("amo")
data("azmp_bottom_temperature")
data("nao")
data("azmp_salinity")

amo_annual <- amo@data |> 
  group_by(year) |> 
  summarise(amo_mean = mean(SSTA_value, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(amo_mean)

nao_annual <- nao@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(nao=anomaly_value)

salinity_annual <-azmp_salinity@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(salinity=mean_value)

stratification_annual <-azmp_stratification@data |> 
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  select(stratification=mean_value)

bottom_temp<-azmp_bottom_temperature@data |> 
  filter(region %in% "4W") |>
  filter(year %in% 1970:2022) |> 
  complete(year=1970:2022) |> 
  select(bottom_temp=mean_value)

#from azmpdata
cil_volume<-azmpdata::Derived_Annual_Broadscale |> 
select(area, year, cold_intermediate_layer_volume) |> 
  filter(area=="scotian_shelf_grid")

#ice_volume derived from ice.max
dat<-gslea::EA.query.f(years=1900:2022, variables=c("ice.max"), EARs=1:7)

 ice_max_volume <- dat |> #sum ice.max across all EAR (gulf regions)
    group_by(year) |>
    summarise(
        total_ice_max = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
 ice_vol<-ice_max_volume |> 
   mutate(ice_vol=total_ice_max/3) |>  #back of the envelope calculation based on comparisons with benoit's data in azmpdata
   add_row(year = 1975, ice_vol = NA) |> #missing 1975
   filter(year>= 1970, year<=2022) |> 
   select(ice_vol)
 

#bind everything
pressures_wss<- cbind(pressures_wss, bottom_temp, nao_annual, amo_annual, salinity_annual, stratification_annual, ice_vol)

#remove weird 2021 fpall value >3, probably also weird
pressures_wss[52,"fp_all"]<-NA

indicators_wss<-ei_wss@data |> 
    select(heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           condition_finfish=CCondition_FINFISH_value,
           condition_zoopiscivore=CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value, 
           mls=MeanLifespan_value,
           biomass_all=BIOMASS_ALL_value,
           biomass_flatfish=BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
           biomass_gadoids=BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
           biomass_skates=BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
           biomass_forage=BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
           ivi_landings=IVILandings_value
           )
mtlc<-mtlc_esswss |> 
  filter(ID %in% "WSS") |> 
  select(MeanTLCommunity)
#join columns
indicators_wss<-cbind(indicators_wss, mtlc)

```


# ESS short indicators
```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

ei_ess<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="ESS"]

indicators_wss<-ei_wss@data |> 
    select(heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           condition_finfish=CCondition_FINFISH_value,
           condition_zoopiscivore=CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value, 
           mls=MeanLifespan_value,
           biomass_all=BIOMASS_ALL_value,
           biomass_flatfish=BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
           biomass_gadoids=BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
           biomass_skates=BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
           biomass_forage=BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
           ivi_landings=IVILandings_value,
           margalef_richness= 
           )
mtlc<-mtlc_esswss |> 
  filter(ID %in% "WSS") |> 
  select(MeanTLCommunity)


```

# OTHER STUFF for gathering data which was not really flexible enough.

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# ---- Core packages ----
library(tidyverse)
library(mgcv)
library(nlme)        # REQUIRED for corAR1 / corCAR1
library(gratia)
library(patchwork)

# ---- Reproducibility ----
set.seed(20240229)

# ---- Global modelling options ----
use_ar1   <- TRUE        # switch between GAM and GAMM
fit_method <- "REML"
gamma_val  <- 1.4

# ---- Threshold detection controls ----
tolerance <- 0.01        # for model selection
alpha     <- 0.08        # hinge significance threshold

# ---- Bootstrap controls (used later) ----
use_block_boot <- TRUE
block_size     <- 5
B_slope        <- 300
n_grid         <- 300
min_run        <- 5

# ---- Utility: safe NA check ----
is_good <- function(x) {
  all(is.finite(x)) && !any(is.na(x))
}
```

# Build datasets
```{r data-builder}
# ---- Load required datasets ----
library(marea)

data("eco_indicators")
data("amo")
data("nao")
data("azmp_bottom_temperature")
data("azmp_stratification")
data("azmp_salinity")
 
library(gslea)
#library(azmpdata)


# ---- Helper: build environmental time series ----
build_environmental <- function(years = 1970:2022, region_vec) {

  amo_annual <- amo@data %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(amo = mean(SSTA_value, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    filter(year %in% years)

  nao_annual <- nao@data %>%
    filter(year %in% years) %>%
    transmute(year, nao = anomaly_value)

  strat <- azmp_stratification@data %>%
    filter(year %in% years) %>%
    transmute(year, stratification = mean_value)

  sal <- azmp_salinity@data %>%
    filter(year %in% years) %>%
    transmute(year, salinity = mean_value)

  bottom_temp <- azmp_bottom_temperature@data %>%
    filter(region %in% region_vec, year %in% years) %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(bottom_temp = mean(mean_value, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    complete(year = years)
  
  #ice_volume derived from ice.max
dat<-gslea::EA.query.f(years=1900:2022, variables=c("ice.max"), EARs=1:7)

 ice_max_volume <- dat |> #sum ice.max across all EAR (gulf regions)
    group_by(year) |>
    summarise(
        total_ice_max = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
 ice_vol<-ice_max_volume |> 
   mutate(ice_vol=total_ice_max/3) |>  #back of the envelope calculation based on comparisons with benoit's data in azmpdata
   add_row(year = 1975, ice_vol = NA) |> #missing 1975
   filter(year>= 1970, year<=2022) |> 
   select(year,ice_vol)

  # Combine
  env <- reduce(
    list(amo_annual, nao_annual, strat, sal, bottom_temp, ice_vol),
    left_join,
    by = "year"
  )

  return(env)
}

#--------------BUILD DATASET FUNCTION------------
build_dataset <- function(region_name = "ESS", years = 1970:2022) {

  # ---- Region mapping ----
  region_vec <- case_when(
    region_name == "ESS" ~ c("4W", "4Vs", "4Vn"),
    region_name == "WSS" ~ c("4X"),
    TRUE ~ c("4W")
  )

  # ---- Filter eco indicators ----
  ei <- eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region == region_name]

  year <- ei@data$year

  # ---- Indicators ----
  indicators <- ei@data %>%
    select(
      heips = Heips_ALL_value,
      lfi = LargeFishIndicator_value,
      mla = MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
      condition_finfish = CCondition_FINFISH_value,
      condition_zoopiscivore = CCondition_ZOOPISCIVORE_value,
      mls = MeanLifespan_value,
      biomass_all = BIOMASS_ALL_value,
      biomass_flatfish = BIOMASS_FLATFISH_value,
      biomass_gadoids = BIOMASS_GADOIDS_value,
      biomass_skates = BIOMASS_SKATES_value,
      biomass_forage = BIOMASS_FORAGE_value,
      ivi_landings = IVILandings_value
    )

  # ---- Fishing pressures ----
  pressures <- ei@data %>%
    select(
      landings_all = landings_ALL_value,
      landings_forage = landings_FORAGE.L_value,
      landings_largepelagic = landings_LARGE_PELAGIC.L_value,
      landings_flatfish = landings_FLATFISH.L_value,
      landings_skates = landings_SKATES.L_value,
      mtl_landings = MeanTL.Landings_value,
      mti_landings = MTI.Landings_3.25_value,
      diversity_tspp = DiversityTargetSpp_ALL_value,
      fp_all = FP_ALL_value,
      fp_clupeids = FP_CLUPEIDS_value
    )

  # ---- Environmental pressures (region-aware) ----
  env <- build_environmental(
    years = years,
    region_vec = region_vec
  )

  pressures <- tibble(year = year) %>%
    bind_cols(pressures) %>%
    left_join(env, by = "year") %>%
    select(-year)

  # ---- Known data issue fix (retain your rule) ----
  if ("fp_all" %in% names(pressures) && nrow(pressures) >= 52) {
    pressures[52, "fp_all"] <- NA
  }

  # ---- Align years ----
  idx <- which(year %in% years)

  indicators <- indicators[idx, ]
  pressures  <- pressures[idx, ]
  year       <- year[idx]

  return(list(
    indicators = indicators,
    pressures  = pressures,
    year       = year
  ))
}
```
